    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 34,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "C5GxXukRXjD1",
        "colab": {

          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "cols = ['iyear','imonth','country_txt','region_txt','attacktype1_txt','gname','weaptype1_txt','nkill','nwound','success','suicide']\n",
        "terr = df[cols].copy()\n",
        "terr.columns = ['Year','Month','Country','Region','AttackType','Group','Weapon','Killed','Wounded','Success','Suicide']\n",
        "terr['Killed'] = terr['Killed'].fillna(0)\n",
        "terr['Wounded'] = terr['Wounded'].fillna(0)\n",
        "terr.dropna(subset=['AttackType','Region','Country'], inplace=True)\n",
        "terr['Total'] = terr['Killed'] + terr['Wounded']\n",
        "print('Done:', terr.shape)"
      ],
      "id": "C5GxXukRXjD1"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 35,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "bP4AXoT5XjD2",
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "outputId": "387a8c4d-c7e6-456c-a469-3a8fbcbfcafd"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Q1: 0.0\n",
            "Q3: 2.0\n",
            "IQR: 2.0\n",
            "Lower: -3.0\n",
            "Upper: 5.0\n",
            "Outliers kept as they are real events\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "Q1 = terr['Killed'].quantile(0.25)\n",
        "Q3 = terr['Killed'].quantile(0.75)\n",
        "IQR = Q3 - Q1\n",
        "print('Q1:', Q1)\n",
        "print('Q3:', Q3)\n",
        "print('IQR:', IQR)\n",
        "print('Lower:', Q1 - 1.5 * IQR)\n",
        "print('Upper:', Q3 + 1.5 * IQR)\n",
        "print('Outliers kept as they are real events')"
      ],
      "id": "bP4AXoT5XjD2"
    },

      "source": [
        "yearly = terr.groupby('Year').size()\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(14,5))\n",
        "plt.plot(yearly.index, yearly.values, color='royalblue', linewidth=2)\n",
        "plt.fill_between(yearly.index, yearly.values, alpha=0.2, color='royalblue')\n",
        "plt.title('Attacks Per Year')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Attacks')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "id": "Ie9CmSwGXjD4"
    },

      "source": [
        "top_c = terr['Country'].value_counts().head(10).sort_values()\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))\n",
        "plt.barh(top_c.index, top_c.values, color='steelblue')\n",
        "plt.title('Top 10 Countries by Attacks')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Number of Attacks')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "id": "SGe2cQlKXjD6"
    },

      "source": [
        "atk = terr['AttackType'].value_counts()\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8,8))\n",
        "plt.pie(atk.values, labels=atk.index, autopct='%1.1f%%',\n",
        "        colors=sns.color_palette('Set2', len(atk)),\n",
        "        wedgeprops={'edgecolor':'white'})\n",
        "plt.title('Attack Types')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "id": "2LaJ8ycvXjD7"
    },

      "source": [
        "reg = terr.groupby('Region')['Killed'].sum().sort_values()\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(11,5))\n",
        "plt.barh(reg.index, reg.values, color=sns.color_palette('Oranges', len(reg)))\n",
        "plt.title('Total Killed by Region')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Killed')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "id": "WLzZ3LYQXjD9"

        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "pvt = terr.groupby(['Region', (terr['Year']//10*10).rename('Decade')]).size().unstack(fill_value=0)\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(13,6))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(pvt, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='YlOrRd', linewidths=0.5)\n",
        "plt.title('Attacks by Region and Decade')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "id": "RCal4l0FXjD-"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",

      "source": [
        "grps = terr[terr['Group']!='Unknown']['Group'].value_counts().head(10)\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,5))\n",
        "plt.bar(grps.index, grps.values, color=sns.color_palette('coolwarm', 10))\n",
        "plt.title('Top 10 Terrorist Groups')\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=40, ha='right')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Attacks')\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "id": "vcTuqVMrXjD_"
    },
    {

      ],
      "source": [
        "yr = terr.groupby('Year')[['Killed','Wounded']].sum()\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(14,5))\n",
        "plt.plot(yr.index, yr['Killed'], label='Killed', color='red', linewidth=2)\n",
        "plt.plot(yr.index, yr['Wounded'], label='Wounded', color='orange', linewidth=2, linestyle='--')\n",
        "plt.title('Killed vs Wounded Per Year')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Year')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Count')\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
